creator: bbtruk@users.sourceforge.net
text:
Thanks for the info!

Testing compilation in a clean environment, there seems to be a missing
dependency in Lazarus port caused by the latest changes (in which some
units were rearranged).

Can you test if this patch solves for you the compilation problem in
Lazarus and therefore also in Double Commander?

(In case you are not familiar with the 'patch' command, you can use the
following: )

# cd /usr/ports/editors/lazarus
# patch -u -p0 < lazarus.patch
